## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Motivation — what problem does this solve or what use case does it enable?

## How

Summary of the approach. Reference [design.md](../design.md) if relevant.

## Testing

How was this tested? Include:
- [ ] Dry-run output for shell/YAML changes
- [ ] Small sweep test for Python changes
- [ ] Docker build for container changes

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes work across at least one SkyPilot backend
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
